title: Dynamic Difficulty
description: A light-weight mod used to change attributes of monsters and other entities in the progress of the players. Configurable.
body:
**This is a configurable mod used to change the attributes of entities in the progress of the player.**
## Detectable Progress
- Time
- Entering New Dimensions
## Modifiable Attributes
- Max Health
- Attack Damage
- Armor
- Armor Toughness
